title: leptogramma obtusata
intro: Leptogramma obtusata, also known as the Mountain Pepper or Tasmanian Pepper, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. It is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections, and has also been used to reduce pain and inflammation. Leptogramma obtusata is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
